---
name: New Role Archetype
about: Add a new role type (e.g., "Mobile Engineer", "Security Engineer")
title: "[Archetype] "
labels: archetype, good first issue
assignees: ""
---

## Role name

e.g., "Mobile Engineer (iOS/Android)"

## Description

Who is this archetype for? What kind of roles does it match?

## Keywords (15-30)

List the key terms recruiters look for in this role:

- keyword1
- keyword2
- ...

## Evaluation weight suggestion

How should the 6 dimensions be weighted for this role?

| Dimension          | Suggested weight |
| ------------------ | ---------------- |
| Shipped Evidence   | ?                |
| Quantified Impact  | ?                |
| Tooling Visibility | ?                |
| ATS Compatibility  | ?                |
| Keyword Match      | ?                |
| Public Proof       | ?                |

## Action verbs (10+)

Strong verbs specific to this role:

- verb1
- verb2
- ...

## Anti-patterns (5+)

Common cliché phrases in this role's CVs:

- "..."
- "..."

## Sources

Where did you research this? Job postings, recruiter articles, etc.
